summary.en: Argentina projects may specify IEC 62196 connector families, including Type 2 for AC charging or CCS Combo 2 for DC charging, through procurement documents, site engineering, fleet requirements, or network interoperability rules. A single mandatory national public-charger connector rule should not be assumed unless a binding Argentine instrument for the specific project says so.
summary.zh: 阿根廷项目可能通过采购文件、现场工程、车队要求或网络互操作规则指定IEC 62196连接器系列，包括交流Type 2或直流CCS Combo 2。除非特定项目适用的阿根廷约束性文件明确规定，不应假设存在统一强制的全国公共充电连接器规则。
summary.zht: 阿根廷項目可能通過採購文件、現場工程、車隊要求或網絡互操作規則指定IEC 62196連接器系列，包括交流Type 2或直流CCS Combo 2。除非特定項目適用的阿根廷約束性文件明確規定，不應假設存在統一強制的全國公共充電連接器規則。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 (Type 2 AC connector; check whether IRAM has formally adopted this as IRAM-IEC 62196-2 — confirm with IRAM before citing as Argentine mandatory standard)
IEC 62196-3 (CCS Combo 2 DC connector; check IRAM adoption status likewise)
IEC 62196-1 (general requirements common to the 62196 family)

summary.en: China chargers and vehicles commonly use GB/T 20234 connector interfaces. GB/T 20234 AC and DC interfaces are not automatically interoperable with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS Combo 2 interfaces used in many IEC-based projects, so connector hardware, cable assemblies, communication, labeling, and user instructions may need Argentina-specific configuration.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩和车辆通常使用GB/T 20234连接接口。GB/T 20234交流和直流接口不会自动与许多IEC体系项目使用的IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS Combo 2接口互通，因此连接器硬件、线缆组件、通信、标识和用户说明可能需要按阿根廷项目配置。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁和車輛通常使用GB/T 20234連接接口。GB/T 20234交流和直流接口不會自動與許多IEC體系項目使用的IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS Combo 2接口互通，因此連接器硬件、線纜組件、通信、標識和用戶說明可能需要按阿根廷項目配置。

gap.en: Do not rely on a China GB/T plug drawing as proof of IEC 62196 interoperability. Confirm the Argentine fleet inlet type, public-network connector requirement, AC or DC communication route, cable ratings, locking behavior, and spare-parts plan before shipment.
gap.zh: 不应将中国GB/T插头图纸作为IEC 62196互操作性的证明。出货前应确认阿根廷车队车辆接口类型、公共网络连接器要求、交流或直流通信路径、线缆额定值、锁止行为及备件方案。
gap.zht: 不應將中國GB/T插頭圖紙作為IEC 62196互操作性的證明。出貨前應確認阿根廷車隊車輛接口類型、公共網絡連接器要求、交流或直流通信路徑、線纜額定值、鎖止行為及備件方案。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary or project-specific unless mandated by tender, concession, public-network rule, fleet contract, utility condition, or another binding Argentine instrument
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T connector configuration is commonly expected for China-market equipment and infrastructure; mandatory status depends on the applicable Chinese product, procurement, or project route

source.title: IEC 62196-2:2022 — Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets – Conductive charging of electric vehicles – Part 2: Dimensional compatibility requirements for AC pin and contact-tube accessories

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 20234 and IEC 62196 connector evidence should be treated as different interface families unless the exact Argentine project documents accept the China connector configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非阿根廷项目文件明确接受中国连接器配置，否则应将GB/T 20234与IEC 62196连接器证据视为不同接口体系。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非阿根廷項目文件明確接受中國連接器配置，否則應將GB/T 20234與IEC 62196連接器證據視為不同接口體系。
